Source: Power Apps What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Apps What's New

Page last updated (ms.date): 2024-08-14
Document last updated: 2025-05-07

## Overview
Power Apps releases weekly updates with new features, fixes, and improvements.
See Released Versions page for detailed weekly release notes.

## Release Cadence
- Semi-annual channel: Twice per year (April and October rollouts)
- Monthly channel: Once per month (follows weekly release schedule)
- Weekly releases rolled out incrementally across regions

## Key Features
- AI copilot capabilities for app building
- Plan designer for AI-assisted development
- Canvas apps, model-driven apps, and code apps
- Dataverse integration
- Solutions and ALM support

## Resources
- Release Planner: https://releaseplans.microsoft.com
- Weekly release notes: /power-platform/released-versions/powerapps
- Known limitations: /powerapps/maker/canvas-apps/common-issues-and-resolutions
